guest@system:~$ ./execute_portfolio.sh

BUILDING SECURE
AI SYSTEMS
OF TOMORROW

> Status: 2nd year BS student @ IIT Patna.
> Specialization: Artificial Intelligence & Cybersecurity.
> Objective: Decentralized systems, machine learning, and building exploit-resistant architecture.

cat /var/log/blog ping -c 4 contact

Intercept Feed

Live analysis of AI developments and network penetration tactics.

connect stream

./about_me

WHOAMI

ID: Mayank Raj. Rank: 2nd-year BS student at IIT Patna (AI & Cybersecurity). CGPA rating: 9.53.

Background log: Led a technical team in Nepal for two years, managing full lifecycles. Contributed to network-building at Rotary's Interact Club. Field experience verified.

Secondary skills: Social Media Manager at Orgazz Enterprises. Communicating complex systemic data into visual interfaces.

[ NODE 1 ] IIT PatnaBS in AI & Cybersecurity // CGPA 9.53/10
[ NODE 2 ] CybersecurityDeloitte Forage certified // Secure architecture
[ NODE 3 ] AI & ML SpecHCL GUVI certified // Satellite ML tracking
[ NODE 4 ] Network OriginNepal + India cross-server routing

cat /var/log/history

SYS_HISTORY

TIMESTAMP: Sep 2025 – Feb 2026
Social Media Manager
TARGET: Orgazz Enterprises LLP · Noida
  • Engineered company's e-commerce portal and graphic system.
  • Injected data-driven marketing algorithms to scale online footprint.
  • Deployed multi-platform content nodes.
TIMESTAMP: Sep 2020 – Sep 2022
Tech Team Lead
TARGET: The Gream Project · Nepal
  • Controlled end-to-end execution cycles.
  • Directed operatives to finalize multi-phase operations over two years.
TIMESTAMP: Feb 2020 – Feb 2022
Technical Node Operator
TARGET: Interact (Rotary Club) · Nepal
  • Executed community protocols and local outreach.
  • Maintained cross-functional technical support.

ls -a /active_exploits

PAYLOADS

T-MINUS: May 2026
Lifelong Medical Records Ledger
Decentralized health data architecture for India. Secure ledger protocol. Tamper-resistant. Privacy overlay enabled.
T-MINUS: Dec 2025
Illegal Logging Detection Model
AI neural net ingesting satellite imagery arrays to identify unregulated geographical logging practices.

PORT 80/443
HTMLCSSSQL_INJJS

div.p: SYS_DATE: document.write(new Date().getFullYear()). ALL NODES SECURE.
